verses.text: Tua ciangin Dawimangpa' ze-etna a thuak dingin Kha Siangtho in gamlakah Jesuh a paipih hi
Jesuh in sun sawmli leh zan sawmli sung an neloin omkhin ahih manin a gil a kial hi
Tua ciangin ama kiangah Dawimangpa hong pai a, “Pasian' Tapa na hih takpi leh hih suangte anlum a suahna dingin thu pia in,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Anlum bek tawh mite nungtalo a, Pasian genkhiat thute tawh nungta zaw hi,’ ci-in kigelh hilo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Dawimangpa in gamlak panin Jerusalem khua-ah Jesuh paipih a, biakinn khumzang a sangpen munah a kahtohpih khit ciangin

“Pasian' Tapa taktak na hih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Pasian in nang a hong kem dingin a vantung mite hong sawl ding hi. Na khete leh suang a kitahkhak lohna dingin vantung mite in a khut uh tawh nang hong dom ding hi,’ ci-in kigelh ahih manin, hih lai panin tuaksuk in,” a ci hi
Jesuh in, “Lai Siangtho mahah, ‘Na Topa Pasian na ze-et kei in,’ ci-in gen hilo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Dawimangpa in mual sang mahmah khatah Jesuh paipihto a, leitung kumpi gam khempeuh leh a hoihna teng a lah khit ciangin
“Ka mai-ah kunin kei hong bia lecin hihte khempeuh nangma tungah kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi
Jesuh in, “Satan aw, taikhia in. Lai Siangtho in, ‘Na Topa Pasian bek bia in la, ama na bek sem in,’ ci hilo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Dawimangpa paikhia a, vantung mite hong pai-in Jesuh huhin an a vak uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Galilee gamah A Nasep Kipan

verses.text: Jesuh in Johan a kimatna thu a zak ciangin Galilee gamsungah va kihem hi
Galilee gam Nazareth khua-ah omsuak loin paikhia leuleu a, Zebulun leh Naftali gamsung Galilee Tuili gei-a om Kapernaum khua-ah a va teng hi
Tua bangin a va ten'na pen kamsangpa Isaiah thugen a tun'na ding ahi hi. Tua a genna-ah
“Gentail mite' ten'na Galilee gamsung, Jordan Gun galkhat, Tuipi lampangah a om Zebulun leh Naftali gam
Khuamial sunga a teng mite in khuavak lianpi mu ding uh hi. Sihna gam khuamial sungah a teng mite tungah khuavak hong taang ding hi,” ci hi
Tua huna kipan Jesuh in thuhilh ding kipan a, “Vantung ki-ukna hong naita ahih manin kisikin na omzia uh kheel un,” ci-in thu a hilh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Ngabeng Mi Li Sam

verses.text: Galilee Tuili gei-ah Jesuh a pai laitakin ngabeng Peter a kici Simon leh a nau Andru, ngen tawh nga khuhin a om a mu hi
Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Kei hong zui un; nga mat bangin pawl tampi a ngah thei mi kong suaksak ding hi,” ci hi
Amaute gel in zong a ngente uh nusia-in Jesuh a zui pah uh hi
Tua lai panin a paikhiat khit uh ciangin Zebedi tapa James leh Johan-te unau, a pa uh tawh gunkuang sungah ngen puahin a om mu leuleu a, amaute gel zong a sam hi
Amaute gel in zong gunkuang leh a pa uh nusia-in Jesuh a zui pah uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Mihonpi tungah Na Sem

verses.text: Galilee gamsung khempeuhah Jesuh pai kawikawi a, amau' kikhopna innte-ah thu hilhin, vantung ki-ukna hangin lungdamna thute hilh a, natna tuamtuam a nei cina khempeuh a damsak hi
Syria gamsung khempeuhah ama thu kizel ahih manin dawivei mi, sibup mi, khutzaw khezaw mi-a kipanin natna satna a tuamtuam a nei mi khempeuh ama kiangah hong kipuak a, amah in a vekpi-in a damsak hi
Galilee gam, Khuapi Sawmte gam, Jerusalem khua, Judea gam leh Jordan Gun galkhat gam panin mi tampi tak in Jesuh a zui uh hi.
